query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.provider,
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  bi.description as billingDesc,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0063'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.provider,
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  bi.description as billingDesc,
  bi.lineAmount as revenue
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0063'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC;
